rulings.Case Title: ABACUS GROUP BUILDERS VS. WEST COAST POWDER COATING, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, April 21, 2011, line 2, DEFENDANTS WEST COAST POWDER COATING, INC., ALLEN COSTA DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE NEGLIGENCE AND PRODUCTS LIABILITY CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF MAY NOT RECOVER IN TORT FOR THE BREACH OF DUTIES THAT MERELY RESTATE CONTRACTUAL OBLIGATIONS. ALSO, PLAINTIFF CANNOT BRING A PRODUCTS LIABILITY CAUSE OF ACTION BECAUSE ITS ALLEGED LOSSES ARE MERELY ECONOMIC. DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO THE BREACH OF CONTRACT CAUSE OF ACTION. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: MARIA GUADALUPE BOJORQUEZ VS. ABM INDUSTRIES, INCORPORATED et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion To Quash Or Modify Deposition Subpoenas; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Deft
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, April 21, 2011, line 2, PLAINTIFF MARIA BOJORQUEZ Motion To Quash Or Modify Deposition Subpoenas; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO QUASH SUBPOENAS IS DENIED. HOWEVER THE SUBPOENAS SHOULD BE AMENDED TO REQUEST ONLY MEDICAL RECORDS RELATED TO PLAINTIFF'S EMOTIONAL STATE OR TREATMENT AND ANY MEDICAL BILLING FOR TREATMENT OF MEDICAL ISSUES. MOTIONS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: JACQUELINE JOHNSON VS. MILENA TALIAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, April 21, 2011, line 5, DEFENDANTS MILENA TALIAN, MISSION BAY HOUSING PTNRS, LP, FILLMORE MARKETPLACE, LP, RELATED MANAGEMENT COMPANY, LP DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendants¿ Demurrer to the 1st cause of action is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff needs to succinctly state that a duty was owed and how that duty was breached by these defendants. Defendants¿ Demurrer to the 2nd cause of action is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff needs to succinctly state that a duty was owed and how that duty was breached by these defendants. Defendants¿ Demurrer to the 3rd cause of action is sustained with leave to amend, Plaintiff needs to attach a copy of the lease agreement to the First Amended Complaint. Defendants¿ Demurrer to the 4th cause of action is sustained without leave to amend. There is no such thing as ¿City Ordinance 2002.¿ Defendants¿ Demurrer to the 5th cause of action is sustained without leave to amend. This is a federal claim that cannot be pled in this Court. Defendant¿s Demurrer to the 6th cause of action is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff needs to clarify what the basis for this cause of action is. Specifically, plaintiff needs to allege what these defendants actually did to cause the problems alleged and how the problems were forms of discrimination against the plaintiff. Defendants¿ Demurrer to the 7th cause of action is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff needs to plead with more specificity the fact upon which she bases this claim. Defendants¿ Demurrer to the 8th cause of action is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff needs to allege what type of discrimination she suffered from based upon the alleged acts by the defendants. Defendants¿ Demurrer to the 9th cause of action is sustained without leave to amend. None of the stated fact are sufficient to state a cause of action against the defendants. Defendants¿ Demurrer to the 10th cause of action is sustained with l

rulings.Case Title: BADEA IBRAHIM MOUSA VS. HUSAIN NASIR et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, April 21, 2011, line 8, DEFENDANT HUSAIN NASIR'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION (FRAUD) OVERRULED. THESE ARE CRIMINAL CLAIMS. PLAINTIFF MAY PLEAD CONVERSION IN THE ALTERNATIVE. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: LUIS SANCHEZ et al VS. ELIZABETH PLATT
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Thursday, April 21, 2011, line 12, DEFENDANT ELIZABETH PLATT'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND.
